plant_disease_remedies.Apple___Apple_scab: Apply sulfur or copper-based fungicides; remove fallen leaves in autumn to prevent overwintering spores.
plant_disease_remedies.Apple___Black_rot: Prune out dead wood and cankers; apply fungicides like Captan or Myclobutanil during the growing season.
plant_disease_remedies.Apple___Cedar_apple_rust: Remove nearby junipers (alternate host); use preventative fungicides such as Myclobutanil starting at bud break.
plant_disease_remedies.Apple___healthy: Maintain regular pruning, balanced fertilization, and adequate watering.
plant_disease_remedies.Blueberry___healthy: Ensure acidic soil pH (4.5–5.5) and keep soil consistently moist but well-drained.
plant_disease_remedies.Cherry_(including_sour)___Powdery_mildew: Improve air circulation; apply neem oil or potassium bicarbonate-based sprays.
plant_disease_remedies.Cherry_(including_sour)___healthy: Prune for airflow and ensure the tree receives full sun.
plant_disease_remedies.Corn_(maize)___Cercospora_leaf_spot Gray: Rotate crops; use resistant hybrids; apply foliar fungicides if infection exceeds 5% of leaf area.
plant_disease_remedies.Corn_(maize)___Common_rust_: Plant resistant varieties; early planting can help avoid peak spore periods.
plant_disease_remedies.Corn_(maize)___Northern_Leaf_Blight: Manage crop residue through tillage; apply fungicides early if symptoms appear on lower leaves.
plant_disease_remedies.Corn_(maize)___healthy: Ensure proper nitrogen levels and weed control to reduce stress.
plant_disease_remedies.Grape___Black_rot: Prune vines to improve sun exposure; remove 'mummies' (shriveled grapes) from the vine; apply copper fungicides.
plant_disease_remedies.Grape___Esca_(Black_Measles): Protect pruning wounds with sealants; remove and destroy infected vines to prevent spread.
plant_disease_remedies.Grape___Leaf_blight_(Isariopsis_Leaf_Spo: Use preventative copper or mancozeb sprays; clear debris from the vineyard floor.
plant_disease_remedies.Grape___healthy: Practice regular canopy management to ensure light penetration and airflow.
plant_disease_remedies.Orange___Haunglongbing_(Citrus_greening): Control the Asian Citrus Psyllid vector with insecticides; remove and destroy infected trees immediately (no cure).
plant_disease_remedies.Peach___Bacterial_spot: Apply copper-based sprays during dormancy; avoid high-nitrogen fertilizers which promote soft, susceptible growth.
plant_disease_remedies.Peach___healthy: Thin fruit to prevent branch breakage and maintain tree vigor.
plant_disease_remedies.Pepper,_bell___Bacterial_spot: Use copper-based bactericides; avoid overhead irrigation; use certified disease-free seeds.
plant_disease_remedies.Pepper,_bell___healthy: Provide consistent moisture and mulch to prevent soil-borne pathogens from splashing.
plant_disease_remedies.Potato___Early_blight: Apply fungicides containing chlorothalonil or mancozeb; practice a 3-year crop rotation.
plant_disease_remedies.Potato___Late_blight: Apply copper fungicides; remove 'volunteer' potatoes; ensure good drainage to prevent waterlogging.
plant_disease_remedies.Potato___healthy: Hill potatoes properly to protect tubers from light and pests.
plant_disease_remedies.Raspberry___healthy: Prune old canes to the ground after harvest; keep rows narrow for airflow.
plant_disease_remedies.Soybean___healthy: Monitor for aphids and ensure proper potassium levels for plant immunity.
plant_disease_remedies.Squash___Powdery_mildew: Apply milk-water solution (40/60) or sulfur-based fungicides; select resistant varieties.
plant_disease_remedies.Strawberry___Leaf_scorch: Remove infected leaves; avoid over-fertilizing with nitrogen; improve spacing for airflow.
plant_disease_remedies.Strawberry___healthy: Mulch with straw to keep fruit off the soil and suppress weeds.
plant_disease_remedies.Tomato___Bacterial_spot: Apply copper sprays; avoid working with plants when they are wet.
plant_disease_remedies.Tomato___Early_blight: Remove lower leaves to prevent soil splash; apply fungicides; use organic mulch.
plant_disease_remedies.Tomato___Late_blight: Destroy infected plants immediately; use copper-based fungicides as a preventative measure.
plant_disease_remedies.Tomato___Leaf_Mold: Increase greenhouse ventilation; keep humidity below 85%; use calcium-based foliar sprays.
plant_disease_remedies.Tomato___Septoria_leaf_spot: Avoid overhead watering; remove lower infected leaves; apply chlorothalonil or copper fungicides.
plant_disease_remedies.Tomato___Spider_mites Two-spotted_spider: Increase humidity; release predatory mites; apply insecticidal soap or neem oil.
plant_disease_remedies.Tomato___Target_Spot: Ensure wide spacing between plants; use preventative fungicides; remove crop debris.
plant_disease_remedies.Tomato___Tomato_Yellow_Leaf_Curl_Virus: Control whitefly populations with yellow sticky traps and neem oil; use reflective mulches.
plant_disease_remedies.Tomato___Tomato_mosaic_virus: Wash hands before handling plants (especially if a smoker); remove infected plants; use resistant varieties.
plant_disease_remedies.Tomato___healthy: Support plants with stakes or cages and provide deep, consistent watering.
